about_description: Software engineer based in the Los Angeles area, building learning products people use every day.
about_bio: I'm a Software Engineer III at Age of Learning in Glendale, California. For more than a decade I've worked on front-end web and mobile experiences for kids and families — from ABCmouse and ReadingIQ to Flutter apps like My Music Academy: Playful Piano, plus in-house tools that help teams create and organize content.
